description_long: This is a large, modern sniper rifle with a robust, angular stock and a long, heavy barrel. The rifle features a prominent scope mounted on top, indicating its use for long-range precision shooting. A bipod is attached near the front of the barrel, providing stability when firing from a prone or supported position. The magazine is box-shaped and detachable, located just in front of the trigger guard. The muzzle end of the barrel is fitted with a sizable muzzle brake, designed to reduce recoil. The overall silhouette is tactical and utilitarian, with a matte, dark finish typical of military or law enforcement sniper rifles.
description: A modern sniper rifle with a long barrel, scope, bipod, and detachable box magazine, finished in a dark matte color.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length, scope, bipod, and box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle brake and bipod legs extending outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, again showing the scope, bipod, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
